Title: Vehicle Configuration - Initial Setup
Preconditions: The application is installed on the user's Android device. Internet connection is required to retrieve vehicle data.
Test Steps:
1. Select the vehicle manufacturer
2. Select the vehicle model
3. Select the vehicle year
4. Select the fuel type
5. Indicate preference for minimizing environmental impact
Expected Result: User's vehicle details are saved and can be used by the application for providing relevant information.

Title: Vehicle Customization - Adding Personalized Details
Preconditions: The application is installed on the user's Android device.
Test Steps:
1. Indicate the vehicle manufacturer
2. Indicate the vehicle model
3. Indicate the vehicle year
4. Indicate the fuel type
5. Indicate the fuel consumption
Expected Result:
User's personalized vehicle details are saved and can be used by the application for providing relevant information.

Title: Access Distributor Page

2. Verify the list of distributors is presented with sorting options
Expected Result: List of distributors is displayed allowing user to select one and navigate to a dedicated application

Title: Open External Navigation
Preconditions: Device is connected to the internet and an external navigation app is installed
Test Steps:
1. Select a distributor from the list
2. Automatically open the external navigation app
Expected Result: External navigation app opens and displays the route to the selected distributor

Title: Access Statistics Page
Test Steps: 1. Click the corresponding button in the navigation bar
Expected Result: User's usage statistics are displayed on the screen

Preconditions: User has made a purchase to register in the app
Test Steps:
1. Open the menu in the statistics screen
2. Select the desired option
3. Present an interface to modify statistics
Expected Result: Updated statistics are displayed on the screen based on user modifications

Title: Reset Statistics
Preconditions: User has generated some usage statistics
Test Steps:

2. Select the desired option
3. Reset the statistics
Expected Result: Statistics page is shown without usage data

Title: Access Settings Page
Test Steps: 1. Click the dedicated button in the settings page
Expected Result: List of modifiable settings is presented on the screen

Title: Modify Vehicle List

Expected Result: Updated vehicle details are saved correctly

Title: Modify Distributor Display Parameters
Test Steps:

2. Confirm the settings entered
3. Update the settings page with new values
Expected Result:
Settings page presents updated information that is saved correctly by the application and used for displaying distributors

User can access distributor pages, view statistics, modify settings, and navigate to selected distributors using an external navigation app. The system requires an initial configuration and internet connection.
---------------------------
TEST CASES
---------------------------

Title: Access Statistics Page
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Settings" menu.
2. Select "Statistics" from the settings options.
3. Verify that the statistics page is displayed.
Expected Result: The statistics page should be successfully loaded and display relevant user statistics.

Title: Modify User Statistics
Preconditions: User is logged into the application and has existing statistics.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Settings" menu.
2. Select "Statistics" from the settings options.
3. Modify one of the statistics values.
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The modified statistics value should be saved and reflected in the statistics page upon refresh.

Title: Zero Out User Statistics
Preconditions: User is logged into the application and has existing statistics.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Settings" menu.
2. Select "Statistics" from the settings options.
3. Click on "Zero Out Statistics".
4. Confirm the action.
Expected Result: All user statistics should be reset to zero and the statistics page should reflect this change.

Title: Access Settings Page
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Settings" menu.
2. Verify that the settings page is displayed.
Expected Result: The settings page should be successfully loaded and display available settings.

Title: Modify Vehicle List
Preconditions: User is logged into the application and has at least one vehicle registered.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the "Settings" menu.
2. Select "Vehicle List" from the settings options.
3. Add a new vehicle or modify an existing vehicle's details.
4. Save the changes.
Expected Result: The updated vehicle list should be saved and reflected in the vehicle list page upon refresh.

Title: Ensure Compliance with Android UI Standards
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Verify that the interface adheres to Android design standards.
Expected Result: The application interface should comply with Android design standards, ensuring a consistent and intuitive user experience.

Title: Ensure Accessibility for Users with Color Deficiency
Preconditions: User is logged into the application.
Test Steps:
1. Open the application.
2. Verify that the application is accessible to users with color deficiency.
Expected Result: The application should provide solutions for users with color deficiency, ensuring a positive user experience for a wider audience.

Title: Ensure Correct Installation During Download
Preconditions: User attempts to download and install the application.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to download and install the application.
2. Verify that the installation completes successfully.
Expected Result: The application should install correctly on the selected device without issues.

Title: Ensure Complete Removal of Application Data Upon Uninstallation
Preconditions: User attempts to uninstall the application.
Test Steps:
1. Attempt to uninstall the application.
2. Verify that all application data is removed from the device.
Expected Result: The application should remove all its data from the device upon uninstallation, ensuring user privacy and device security.

Title: Prevent Malfunctioning Interactions with External Services
Preconditions: User interacts with external services through the application.
Test Steps:
1. Use the application to interact with external services.
2. Monitor for any malfunctions or errors.
Expected Result: The application should prevent malfunctions during interactions with external services, ensuring smooth performance.

Title: Ensure Continuous Update of Fuel Prices
Test Steps:
1. Use the application to check fuel prices.
2. Verify that the prices are up-to-date.
Expected Result: The application should continuously update fuel prices from the government dataset, ensuring accurate and timely information. <|end|>

Title: Application should respond within 4.20 seconds for all operations
Test Steps:
1. Perform various operations within the application (e.g., search for distributors, calculate costs, etc.)
2. Measure the time taken for each operation
3. Repeat the process multiple times to ensure consistency
Expected Result: Each operation should complete within 4.20 seconds.

Title: Application should not exceed 50 MB of storage space
Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device
2. Monitor the storage usage while using the application
3. Verify that the total storage usage does not exceed 50 MB
Expected Result: The application should not consume more than 50 MB of storage space.

Title: Application should be compatible with Android 8.1 and later versions

Test Steps:
1. Install the application on a device running Android 8.1 or later
2. Launch the application
3. Verify that the application runs without issues
Expected Result: The application should run smoothly on devices running Android 8.1 or later.
